FreeAgent:

MacSpeech Dictate. Select all. Make selection bold.

Posted on 11 February 2008 by Johannes Fahrenkrug. Tags:
Another refreshing video by David Pogue period. New line. Finally a decent speech recognition software for the Mac period. And who would have thought that David had the same problem so many of us computer monkeys are plagued with question mark? New line. The video dash MacSpeech website period.
